title: Notice to exporters: impact of the UK’s accession to the CPTPP on Certificates of Free Sale for cosmetic products
body: "Notice on the impact of the UK’s accession to the Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) on Certificates of Free Sale (CFS) for cosmetic products.  Issued on 5 February 2025 by the Import Licensing Branch, Department for Business and Trade.  "
